mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.real_name AS teacher_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = c.id) AS student_count FROM course c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.teacher_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id}

SELECT c.*, u.real_name AS teacher_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = c.id) AS student_count FROM course c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.teacher_id = u.id WHERE c.id IN (SELECT course_id FROM course_student WHERE student_id = #{studentId}) ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course (name, code, description, teacher_id, semester) VALUES (#{name}, #{code}, #{description}, #{teacherId}, #{semester})
mapper.update: UPDATE course SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, semester = #{semester}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
